name: search_leads
description: Search for leads by criteria such as last contact date, status, industry, or company name. Returns a list of matching leads with summary info.

last_contact_before.description: ISO 8601 date — find leads not contacted since this date (e.g. 2025-06-01)

industry.description: Filter by industry (e.g. fintech, healthcare, ecommerce)

limit.description: Max number of results to return (default 10)

name: get_lead_details
description: Get full details for a specific lead including contact info, company, deal value, current status, and complete activity history (calls, emails, meetings, notes).

name: update_lead_status
description: Update the status of a lead. Use 'pending_followup' when the user approves a lead for follow-up. Always log an activity explaining why the status changed.

name: log_activity
description: Record an activity or interaction for a lead. Use this every time you take an action — sending an email, making a call, scheduling a meeting, or adding notes.

summary.description: Brief description of what was done or discussed

name: draft_followup_email
description: Generate a personalized follow-up email for a lead based on their history and the reason for re-engagement. Returns the draft for review before sending.

reason.description: Why you are re-engaging this lead (e.g. new product launch, pricing change, time-based follow-up)
